schema: per-node image-to-video loops seeded from curated plates (canon A4/A6)

loops.prompt: Static locked-off camera, the exact same scene breathing in place: faint heat shimmer only, the laminated pass on the visor barely trembling, dust motes drifting inside the cabin, the road and horizon completely still, no smoke, no dust plumes, nothing changes outside the windshield. Subtle analog VHS idle loop, motion only, nothing enters or leaves frame, ends exactly where it began.
loops.curation: s2188: pass trembles, horizon still; s1187 rejected for phantom smoke plume on the road and oversized pass swing

loops.prompt: Static locked-off camera, the exact same scene breathing in place: the amber hazard lights blinking in a slow steady rhythm, bluebonnets at the shoulder stirring in light wind, the distant headlights glimmering, the wagon itself perfectly still. Subtle analog VHS idle loop, motion only, nothing enters or leaves frame, ends exactly where it began.
loops.curation: hazards blink, wind-drifted open door settles home — physically motivated, kept deliberately

loops.prompt: Static locked-off camera, the exact same scene breathing in place: the bluebonnet field swaying gently in waves of light wind, the paired distant headlights on the horizon flickering faintly, the sky unchanged. Subtle analog VHS idle loop, motion only, nothing enters or leaves frame, ends exactly where it began.
loops.curation: first take clean: field sways, horizon headlights flicker, sky steady

loops.curation: first take clean: padlock sways on chain, flowers stir, frame steady

loops.prompt: Static locked-off camera, the exact same scene breathing in place: the field luminescence breathing slowly brighter and dimmer, flowers swaying gently, the two distant red taillights staying as faint constant points that only barely shimmer, never flaring, never brightening, the culvert mouth dark and still. Subtle analog VHS idle loop, motion only, nothing enters or leaves frame, ends exactly where it began.
loops.curation: s2188: luminescence breathes, taillights constant; s1187 rejected for taillight flare reading as the car acting on a 6s metronome

loops.prompt: Static locked-off camera, the exact same scene breathing in place: the shoulder-high bluebonnets swaying while leaning away from the dark end of the path, their faint glow pulsing gently, the path and sky completely dark and empty, pure black frame edges, absolutely no marks or shapes at the top or bottom of frame. Subtle analog VHS idle loop, motion only, nothing enters or leaves frame, ends exactly where it began.
loops.curation: s3189 clean; s1187 rejected for transient glyph-like burn marks at frame edges (A1)

loops.prompt: Static locked-off camera, the exact same scene breathing in place: the blue glow spilling from the car grille and dashboard pulsing softly, the surrounding flowers swaying in night wind, the car body, wheels and windshield absolutely motionless, frozen, parked dead still. loops.prompt: Static locked-off camera, the exact same scene breathing in place: the television screen static churning and flickering, its pale light dancing across the surrounding glowing bluebonnets, the deck and buttons perfectly steady. loops.curation: first take clean: static churns with rolling bands, deck steady

Two takes flared the dead screen back to life mid-loop. Decision: EJECT ending ships as a still frame BY DESIGN — containment is stillness; the RECORD ending loops because the tape keeps running. The endings are asymmetric on purpose.

loops.curation: first take clean: red static churns, lamp steady, set still
